case_number: civil nature while categorically stating that no harassment

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 686 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. None present for petitioner. On last date of hearing same was the position. However, official respondent No.2 (SSP Hyderabad) has filed his comments wherein he has specifically mentioned that dispute in question is primarily of property and of civil nature while categorically stating that no harassment was caused to the petitioner by the police officials. The said official respondent No.2 has further offered to provide legal protection and assistance whenever requested by the petitioner. Primarily, the dispute is of a plot of land having Survey No. 1024/201 measuring 64-00 square yards situated at Ward “G” Hyderabad, between petitioner and respondent No.4, who is purportedly his stepbrother. Looking at the casual attitude of the petitioner, it appears that he is not interested to proceed with the matter. Even otherwise, in view of the comments filed by official respondents, this petition can be disposed of with the directions that the petitioner is at liberty to seek his remedy before appropriate forum and in case his life or liberty is threatened by some person, he can approach the police officials, who will provide him requisite protection in accordance with law. Consequently, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
